zh.lifeSummary: 當Averina Vibert於1618年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Abraham Vibert34歲，母親Agnes Smith33歲。她於1639年10月27日與Richard Lanphear - Lanphere在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓 聖 邁克爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年12月在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼聖 瑪麗 馬特費隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Averina Vibert于1618年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Abraham Vibert34岁，母亲Agnes Smith33岁。她于1639年10月27日与Richard Lanphear - Lanphere在英国英格兰哈普爾素坦普頓 聖 邁克爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年12月在英国英格兰米德萊可享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼聖 瑪麗 馬特費隆。

nameMeanings.name: Vibert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of French Huguenot origin): from the ancient Germanic personal name Wigberht, composed of the elements wig ‘battle’ and berht ‘bright’. As a French surname this is a regional variant of Guibert .

variants.name: Guibert
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Wigberht, composed of the elements wig ‘battle’ and berht ‘bright’. Compare Vibert .
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Averina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Norman name   Evelyn .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Averina Vibert was born in 1618, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Abraham Vibert, was 34 and her mother, Agnes Smith, was 33. She married Richard Lanphear - Lanphere on 27 October 1639, in Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in December 1678, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Saint Mary Matfelon, Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Averina Vibert est née en 1618, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Abraham Vibert, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes Smith, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Lanphear - Lanphere le 27 octobre 1639, à Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1678, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Mary Matfelon, Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Averina Vibert 1618 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Abraham Vibert 34 und ihre Mutter Agnes Smith 33. Sie hat am 27. Oktober 1639 in Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Lanphear - Lanphere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1678 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint Mary Matfelon, Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Lanphear - Lanphere il 27 ottobre 1639, nel Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Averina Vibertが1618年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Abraham Vibertは34歳，母Agnes Smithは33歳であった。1639年10月27日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトン スト ミチャエルでRichard Lanphear - Lanphereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1678年12月にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーサイント マリー マトフエロンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary, Whitechapel, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니 세인트 메리 마트프런
ko.Southampton St Michaels, Hampshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴 스트 믹하얼
ko.Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Averina Vibert(이)가 1618년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Abraham Vibert(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Smith(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1639년 10월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴 스트 믹하얼에서 Richard Lanphear - Lanphere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니 세인트 메리 마트프런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Averina Vibert nasceu em 1618, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Abraham Vibert, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Smith, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Lanphear - Lanphere em 27 de outubro de 1639, em Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1678, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Mary Matfelon, Stepney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Engla: соутамптон ст мачаел, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Averina Vibert родилась в 1618 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Abraham Vibert было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Smith, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Lanphear - Lanphere 27 октября 1639 г. в местности соутамптон ст мачаел, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1678 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри матфелон, степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Engla: Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Averina Vibert nació en 1618, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Abraham Vibert, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes Smith, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Richard Lanphear - Lanphere el 27 de octubre de 1639, en Southampton St Michael, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1678, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Mary Matfelon, Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
